SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service

Class IssueReportServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.IssueReportServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IssueReportService
@Service @Transactional public class IssueReportServiceImpl extends Object implements IssueReportService
Default IssueReportService implementation providing report CRUD and administrative updates.

  • Constructor Details

    • IssueReportServiceImpl

      @Autowired public IssueReportServiceImpl(IssueReportRepository issueReportRepository, UserService userService, AcceptedStateRepository acceptedStateRepository, IssueTypeRepository issueTypeRepository, jakarta.validation.Validator validator)
      Creates a service using the provided repositories and validator.
      Parameters:
      issueReportRepository - issue report repository.
      userService - user service for resolving the current user.
      acceptedStateRepository - accepted state repository.
      issueTypeRepository - issue type repository.
      validator - Bean Validation validator.

      Returns summaries of reports owned by the currently authenticated user.
